# Localhouse Designs

Localhouse Designs is a Broken Arrow, Oklahoma web studio led by Steven Rausch. The studio builds custom websites, local SEO/GEO foundations, structured data, chat-first contact paths, and ERP-aware internal tools for service businesses and operations-heavy teams.

## Primary Site

- Homepage: https://localhousedesigns.com/
- About: https://localhousedesigns.com/about
- Services: https://localhousedesigns.com/services
- Work: https://localhousedesigns.com/work
- Contact: https://localhousedesigns.com/contact

## Local Service Pages

- Broken Arrow web design: https://localhousedesigns.com/broken-arrow-web-design
- Tulsa web design: https://localhousedesigns.com/tulsa-web-design
- Local SEO for service businesses: https://localhousedesigns.com/local-seo-for-service-businesses
- Salon website design Tulsa: https://localhousedesigns.com/salon-website-design-tulsa
- Tulsa service business websites: https://localhousedesigns.com/tulsa-service-business-websites

## Proof And Case Studies

- Work overview: https://localhousedesigns.com/work
- North Styles case study: https://localhousedesigns.com/work/north-styles
- NorCal Sauce Worx case study: https://localhousedesigns.com/work/norcal-sauce-worx
- Local GEO Standard case study: https://localhousedesigns.com/work/local-geo-standard

## Key Topics

- Broken Arrow web design
- Tulsa web design
- Oklahoma local SEO
- Local SEO for service businesses
- Salon, barber, stylist, and grooming websites
- Booking-platform replacement websites
- Structured data and Schema.org
- GEO and answer-engine optimization
- Angular development
- ERP-aware workflow tools

## Contact Preference

The chat window on https://localhousedesigns.com/contact is the preferred first contact path. Email backup is steven@localhousedesigns.com.
